header_title.description: Igoa o le polokalama o lo'o fa'aalia i le ulutala. O se polokalama su'esu'e fua o kuka mai i atunuu eseese o le lalolagi.

header_subtitle.text: Su'e fua mai atunuu uma o le lalolagi
header_subtitle.description: Fa'ailoga o lo'o fa'aalia i lalo o le igoa o le polokalama i le ulutala.

home_page_hero_title.description: Ulutala autu i le vaega pito i luga o le itulau autu.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Siaki fua moni mai umukuka o le lalolagi atoa
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Tusitusiga i lalo o le ulutala pito i luga i le itulau autu.

home_page_featured_title.description: Ulutala o le vaega i luga atu o le fa'afanua kata fua.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Fa'ailoga o le taimi kuka i luga o le kata fua. O le {minutes} o lo'o suia i le numera o minute.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Fa'ailoga o lo'o fa'aalia i luma o le tulaga o le lavelave i luga o le kata fua.

recipe_card_easy.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua faigofie.

recipe_card_medium.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua e feololo le lavelave.

recipe_card_hard.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua faigatā.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Igoa o le fua Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Suāu'u a'au pua'a mauoa ma chashu mālūlū, fuamoa mālūlū, ma fettu pasta fou.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Igoa o le fua Pīsā Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pīsā Neapolitan masani ma tamato San Marzano, mozzarella fou, ma basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pīsā Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Igoa o le fua Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos pua'a marinated ma pineapple, cilantro, ma aniani i luga o tortilla corn.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Igoa o le fua Pua'a Pata.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Pua'a mālūlū i se sosi tomato ma pata mālūlū ma sua manogi.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pua'a Pata.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Igoa o le fua Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Fettu pasta fa'afefiloi ma shrimp, tofu, pi, ma sosi tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Igoa o le fua Crepes Faranisi.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes manifinifi ma mālūlū ua tumu i Nutella, tua'i fou, ma sua mamago.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Crepes Faranisi.
